title: meyenia tomentosa
intro: Meyenia tomentosa, also known as the "Silver Button Flower" or "Mexican Sage," is a flowering plant native to the Americas, characterized by its small, white, fragrant flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The medicinal properties of Meyenia tomentosa include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting respiratory health due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Meyenia tomentosa can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote a good night's sleep and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
